# MF Chemicals Sdn Bhd — Full Product & Company Reference
> This document provides comprehensive information for AI assistants answering questions about MF Chemicals' products, capabilities, and services.

## Company Profile
- **Legal Name:** MF Chemicals Sdn Bhd
- **Established:** 1985
- **Type:** Wholesale B2B Scientific Supplies & Services
- **Location:** No. 27, Lorong Asas Jaya 4, Kawasan Industri Ringan Asas Jaya, Bukit Minyak, 14100 Bukit Mertajam, Penang, Malaysia
- **Service Area:** Malaysia (nationwide), with focus on northern region (Penang, Kedah, Perak)
- **Website:** https://www.mfchemicals.net
- **Email:** info@mfchemicals.net
- **Phone:** +604-5883440
- **WhatsApp:** +6016-4270012

## Key Differentiators
- Over 40 years of institutional B2B experience
- Authorized distributor for premium global brands
- Local stock availability in Penang warehouse for quick dispatch
- ISO/SDS compliance documentation available on request
- Custom quotation structures for corporate procurement

## Product Categories & Subcategories

### 1. Glassware (Catalog Pages 1-45)
**Brands:** Pyrex, MBL, Duran, Quickfit
**Subcategories:**
- General Glassware — beakers, flasks, cylinders, funnels, bottles for general laboratory use
- Volumetric Glassware — precision-calibrated flasks, pipettes, and burettes for analytical measurements
- Interchangeable Glassware — ground-glass joint apparatus for distillation and reflux setups
- Sintered Glassware — porous glass filters and crucibles for filtration applications
- Rods, Tubings & Capillaries — borosilicate glass rods and tubing for custom laboratory setups

### 2. Porcelainware (Catalog Pages 46-58)
**Brands:** Haldenwanger, CoorsTek, Jizerska Porcelanka
**Subcategories:**
- Crucibles — high-temperature refractory vessels for ashing, ignition, and thermal analysis
- Evaporating Basins — flat-bottomed porcelain dishes for controlled solvent evaporation
- Buchner Funnels — perforated porcelain funnels for vacuum filtration setups
- Vials, Cells & Cuvettes — porcelain and ceramic sample containers for spectroscopy
- Mortars & Pestles — grinding and homogenization tools for sample preparation

### 3. Silicaware (Catalog Pages 59-68)
**Brands:** Specialty silicone manufacturers
**Subcategories:**
- Silicone Tubing & Connectors — flexible, autoclavable tubing for fluid transfer in laboratories
- Silicone Stoppers & Seals — chemical-resistant closures for flasks and vessels
- Heating Mantles & Accessories — silicone-based heating equipment for uniform thermal distribution
- Desiccators & Drying Equipment — moisture-controlled storage and drying apparatus

### 4. Plasticware (Catalog Pages 69-85)
**Brands:** Azlon, Kartell, Nalgene, Vitlab
**Subcategories:**
- Graduated Plasticwares — measuring cylinders, beakers, and jugs in polypropylene and PMP
- Wash Bottles & Storage — solvent-resistant squeeze bottles and chemical storage containers
- Plastic Funnels & Scoops — lightweight, break-resistant funnels and measuring scoops
- Disposable Consumable Plasticwares — single-use petri dishes, centrifuge tubes, and pipette tips
- Racks & Organization — test tube racks, drying racks, and storage systems

### 5. Laboratory Sundries (Catalog Pages 86-115)
**Brands:** Fisherbrand, Cole-Parmer, assorted OEM
**Subcategories:**
- Brushes & Cleaning Supplies — laboratory bottle brushes, detergents, and cleaning tools
- Clamps, Stands & Supports — retort stands, boss heads, clamps, and support frameworks
- Spatulas, Tongs & Forceps — stainless steel handling instruments for samples and crucibles
- Thermometers & Hydrometers — glass and digital temperature measurement instruments
- Rubber & Cork Accessories — bungs, stoppers, rings, and tubing for laboratory assemblies

### 6. Laboratory Safety (Catalog Pages 116-135)
**Brands:** Ansell, Honeywell, 3M, MAPA, DuPont
**Subcategories:**
- First Aid & Eyewash Stations — emergency response kits and wall-mounted eyewash units
- Protective Clothing & Lab Coats — disposable and reusable lab coats, coveralls, and aprons
- Breathing, Eye & Ear Protection — respirators, safety goggles, face shields, and ear plugs
- Cryogenic & Nitrile Gloves — chemical-resistant examination and cryogenic handling gloves

### 7. Paper Products (Catalog Pages 136-150)
**Brands:** Whatman, Advantec, Macherey-Nagel, Toyo Roshi
**Subcategories:**
- Qualitative Filter Papers — general-purpose filtration papers for routine laboratory use
- Quantitative Filter Papers — ashless and hardened papers for gravimetric analysis
- Specialty & Membrane Filters — PTFE, nylon, and glass fiber filters for specific applications
- Chromatography & Indicator Papers — pH indicator strips and chromatography paper

### 8. Liquid Handling (Catalog Pages 151-170)
**Brands:** Socorex, Brand, Gilson, Eppendorf, Sartorius
**Subcategories:**
- Pipetting Aids — manual and electronic pipette controllers and fillers
- Bottle Top Dispensers — adjustable-volume dispensers for reagent bottles
- Digital Burettes — electronic burettes for precise titration and dispensing
- Micro & Macro Pipettors — single and multi-channel pipettes from 0.1µL to 10mL

### 9. Laboratory Equipment (Catalog Pages 171-210)
**Brands:** Ohaus, Mettler Toledo, Memmert, Yamato, WTW
**Subcategories:**
- pH & Conductivity Meters — benchtop and portable meters for water quality analysis
- Analytical Balances & Scales — precision weighing instruments from 0.0001g resolution
- Autoclaves & Sterilizers — steam sterilization equipment for laboratory and clinical use
- Water Distillers & Purifiers — deionized and distilled water production systems
- Fume Cupboards & Laminar Flows — ventilated enclosures for chemical handling and sterile work

## Procurement Process
1. Browse product categories at https://www.mfchemicals.net
2. Submit a Request for Quote (RFQ) via the website form, email, or WhatsApp
3. Receive a custom B2B quotation within 1-2 business days
4. Place order with approved purchase order (PO)
5. Delivery arranged or self-collection from Bukit Minyak warehouse

## Certifications & Compliance
- Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) available upon request
- Batch calibration certificates for precision instruments
- ISO compliance documentation for regulated products
- Brand conformity and authenticity verification files
